Name: PRC Applications
Description:
AboutBusiness descriptionPRC Applications is a small team based out of Asheville North Carolina. Our goal is simple: produce online and mobile experiences that delight our clients and their customers. We have over a decade of experience helping clients implement eCommerce strategies on Shopify.Select PartnerPartners are tiered based on multiple factors, including their history of experience and proven success on Shopify.Specialized servicesBusiness strategy guidanceContact for pricingDescription: We start by learning your specific goals and objectives, and we combine tried-and-true methodologies that work for everyone, with techniques recommend specifically for your business. This pricing includes an hour of coaching and training time, and we'll develop an action plan with next steps for your approval.

Additional work and price information:
Often times, coaching is an ongoing process, especially for those who are new to digital sales. We can provide resources and training in the first hour of time, however we will also put together an action plan for the future that includes ongoing coaching on an as-needed basis. There is never any obligation or minimums beyond the hour of time, but we are confident that you'll find our courteous, knowledgeable, and personable business coaches to be an invaluable asset to your online business.Custom apps and integrationsContact for pricingDescription: We typically begin with a detailed discussion of your business logic needs. Once we have a full understanding of what is needed in an application, we will provide you with a precise specification that will describe the features and functionality of the application. Once approved, we will build a hosted web application on Google's high-availability cloud infrastructure. You may host the application yourself, or we will be happy to host and maintain the application for a monthly fee.

Additional work and price information:
Often times this type of service is requested when integrating Shopify's API with that of a 3rd-party service, or introducing automations to the Shop. Before recommending custom development, we evaluate whether the functionality you need can be achieved with existing applications or with Shopify itself. A custom application truly expands the capabilities of what is possible with Shopify, and is a great option for shop owners experiencing efficiency pain-points within their business.Store build or redesignContact for pricingDescription: We will start by helping you determine your precise needs for your shop design. Often times we take one of two approaches — we begin with a mockup phase and implement a fully custom design, or we start with a theme from the Shopify theme store and make customizations. The main goal is to ensure that your brand and messaging is properly reflected throughout the shop, and provide you with the tools and capabilities to create an accessible and engaging shopping experience for your customers.

Additional work and price information:
Setting up a theme from the theme store is the lower cost option, but in many cases shop owners are seeking a fully unique and custom design. In this case we will start with the production and approval of interactive prototypes using Adobe XD. Once approved, we will either fully customize an existing theme, or we will build our own theme using Slate, Shopify's open-source tool that allows us to build out completely custom designs from the ground up.Store migrationContact for pricingDescription: Have an existing store on Etsy, Squarespace, or WooCommerce, or another platform? We'll be happy to get you moving with Shopify, and we're confident you'll love the platform! A basic migration includes moving your catalog, basic pages, basic visual identity, and settings over. We'll make sure you're comfortable managing orders and fulfillments with Shopify, and that you're offering your customers all of the same or improved features and functionality they found on your existing store.

Additional work and price information:
The pricing for this service reflects relatively simple cases for small-to-medium-sized stores. The following considerations may incur additional costs:

* Custom theme implementation
* Importing customer/order histories
* Importing from a custom eCommerce system
* Migrating gift cards and discounts
* Migrating custom features and functionality
* Significant content entry
* Large catalogs
* Peripheral features (such as payment plans, subscriptions, and rewards)
* Complex fulfillment needsTheme customizationContact for pricingDescription: We will begin by helping you evaluate your needs for any custom features and/or code. The scope of this type of work can vary, but examples include implementing custom fields, setting up automations and integrations through Shopify's API, or building an interactive feature that will allow your customers to learn more about your products. We will work closely with you to ensure that your precise needs are met with any functionality that we implement.

Additional work and price information:
Before we make a recommendation we will help you to determine if an existing application or theme feature will accommodate your needs. If we determine that custom code is required, many times it can be completed within the theme, however in some cases it may require the use of a hosted WebService (typically built using NodeJS) to interact with Shopify's API.Other servicesAnalytics and tracking, Conversion rate optimization, Custom domain setup, Logo and visual branding, POS setup and migration, Product and collection setupMore servicesIndustriesClothing and fashion, Food and drink, Jewelry and accessories, Sports and recreationFeatured workTable Wine AshevilleTable Wine Asheville is the premiere wine retailer in Asheville, North Carolina, offering “artisanal wines at affordable prices.”
